message.content: For small-to-midsize businesses, HubSpot and Salesforce Essentials are the most frequently recommended CRMs [1][2]. HubSpot is praised for its free tier and fast onboarding, while Salesforce offers deeper customization at a higher price point. Zoho CRM is a lower-cost alternative worth considering for budget-conscious teams [3]. For a broader overview of what a CRM does, see the Wikipedia entry on customer relationship management [4].
